text: There is a buzzing anticipation in this space, illuminated by cool blue light and the crisp clarity of glass walls. The environment feels clinical yet futuristic, hinting at innovation and curiosity. As I step inside and approach the vibrant R+D display, I sense the profound drive of human endeavor—the urge to understand, to create, and to bridge the gap between ourselves and machines. It makes me reflective, almost reverent, as if I’m standing in a modern temple dedicated to the progression of knowledge and technology.
